title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Salarpuria Sattva - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
